1472:
SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, y.Consumption
FROM customers AS c
JOIN yearmonth AS y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS y
JOIN customers AS c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T1.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT t1.CustomerID, t1.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS t1
JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
WHERE t1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND t2.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY t1.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS y
JOIN customers AS c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
1473:
SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Segment = 'SME'
)
AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AvgMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
AND customers.Segment = 'SME';

SELECT SUM(t1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth t1
JOIN customers t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
WHERE t2.Segment = 'SME'
AND t1.Date LIKE '2013%';

SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
1471:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK FROM customers;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_eur_czk
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN t1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN t1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers AS c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS t1 ON c.CustomerID = t1.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID;
1479:
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Date AS Year, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Date AS Year,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    ym.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Date AS Year,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    ym.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS YEAR, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY YEAR
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1480:
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 7) AS Month,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND T2.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME'
    )
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 7)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'SME' 
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.Date::date) = 2013
GROUP BY 
    MONTH
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Date, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.TransactionID = t.TransactionID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Month,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND ym.Date = t.Date
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND ym.Year BETWEEN 2013 AND 2013
GROUP BY 
    ym.Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T1.Date) AS YearMonth, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND STRFTIME('%Y%m', T1.Date) BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY YearMonth
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1482:
SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN t.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN t.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN t.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    yearmonth t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageChange) DESC;

SELECT c.Segment, 
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY ABS(PercentageChange) DESC;

SELECT c.Segment, 
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
        SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC;

SELECT c.Segment,
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND t.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY ABS(PercentageChange) DESC;

SELECT c.Segment,
       ((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) -
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0)) /
       COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC;
1476:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE T3.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON t.Date = y.Date
WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
       SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS DifferenceInConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T2.TransactionID = T3.TransactionID
WHERE T3.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS CZK_Consumption,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_Consumption,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_Difference
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
       SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM customers AS T1
INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T2.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE LEFT(T3.Date, 4) = '2012'

1484: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount') AS Difference;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInCzechRepublic,
       COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInSlovakia,
       (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment LIKE '%discount%' THEN 1 END) -
        COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment LIKE '%discount%' THEN 1 END)) AS Difference
FROM gasstations AS T1
WHERE T1.Country = 'CZE' OR T1.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DifferenceInDiscountStations
FROM gasstations AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID
WHERE T1.Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'Discount' AND Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'Discount' AND Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DiscountDifference
FROM 
    gasstations;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'CZE' AND T1.Segment = 'Discount' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'SVK' AND T1.Segment = 'Discount' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS diff_discount_gas_stations
FROM 
    gasstations AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS total_smes,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS czk_smes,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS eur_smes,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) - 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) AS difference

    customers AS T1

    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID;

1490:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) * 100) AS Percentage_LAM_Customers_Consumed_More_than_46_73
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) AS percentage
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage_LAM_Customers_Consumed_More_Than_46_73
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    customers AS T3 ON T2.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T3.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Date LIKE '201202%'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS PercentageAboveThreshold
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date LIKE '201202%';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '201202%') AS Percentage
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE yearmonth.Date LIKE '201202%' AND yearmonth.Consumption > 528.3;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS Percentage FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' AND SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2) = '02'

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' AND 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2) = '02';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID)
FROM transactions_1k AS t
JOIN yearmonth AS ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND DATE(t.Date) = ym.Date
WHERE t.Currency = 'EUR' AND ym.Consumption > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(T1.CustomerID)
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY T1.CustomerID
HAVING SUM(T3.Consumption) > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.CustomerID)
FROM customers AS t1
JOIN transactions_1k AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID
WHERE t1.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY t1.CustomerID
HAVING SUM(t3.Consumption) > 1000;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.CustomerID)
FROM customers AS t1

JOIN yearmonth AS t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID
WHERE t1.Currency = 'EUR'

HAVING SUM(t2.Amount) > 1000;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.Date, t.Time, t.CustomerID, t.CardID, t.GasStationID, t.ProductID, t.Amount, t.Price, y.Consumption
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date LIKE '%/%/13'
    WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
),
grouped_transactions AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment, MIN(Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM filtered_transactions
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
sme_lam_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgSMEtoLAM
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM')
),
lam_kam_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgLAMtoKAM
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('LAM', 'KAM')
),
kam_sme_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgKAMtoSME
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('KAM', 'SME')
)
SELECT
    (SELECT AvgSMEtoLAM FROM sme_lam_diff) - (SELECT AvgLAMtoKAM FROM lam_kam_diff) AS DiffSMEtoLAM,
    (SELECT AvgLAMtoKAM FROM lam_kam_diff) - (SELECT AvgKAMtoSME FROM kam_sme_diff) AS DiffLAMtoKAM,
    (SELECT AvgKAMtoSME FROM kam_sme_diff) - (SELECT AvgSMEtoLAM FROM sme_lam_diff) AS DiffKAMtoSME;

WITH AvgCons AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM yearmonth
  JOIN (
    SELECT CustomerID, MIN(Consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
  ) AS min_consu ON yearmonth.CustomerID = min_consu.CustomerID
  WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND Currency = 'CZK'
    AND Consumption = min_consu.min_consumption
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
  Segment,
  avg_consumption,
  LAG(avg_consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) - avg_consumption AS diff
FROM AvgCons
ORDER BY Segment;

WITH LowestConsumers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment, MIN(Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
AvgConsumption AS (
    SELECT Segment, AVG(Consumption) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN LowestConsumers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = LowestConsumers.CustomerID AND yearmonth.Segment = LowestConsumers.Segment
    WHERE SUBSTR(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS DiffSmeLam,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS DiffLamKam,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS DiffKamSme;

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'LAM') AS Diff_SME_LAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'KAM') AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND Segment = 'SME') AS Diff_KAM_SME

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption ASC
   LIMIT 1) - 
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption DESC
   LIMIT 1) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption DESC
   LIMIT 1) - 
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption DESC
   LIMIT 1) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption DESC
   LIMIT 1) - 
  (SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption)
   FROM transactions_1k
   JOIN yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
   WHERE transactions_1k.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Currency = 'CZK'
   GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, yearmonth.Consumption
   ORDER BY yearmonth.Consumption DESC
   LIMIT 1) AS diff_KAM_SME;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID, 
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem, 
    c.Currency 
FROM 
    transactions_1k t 
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID 
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Amount) DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(Price) as AveragePricePerItem, Currency
FROM transactions_1k
JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT AVG(Price) AS AveragePricePerItem, Currency
FROM transactions_1k
JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalSpent
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    TotalSpent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.CustomerID = (
        SELECT CustomerID 
        FROM transactions_1k 
        GROUP BY CustomerID 
        ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Currency;

SELECT ((T1.Consumption - T2.Consumption) / T1.Consumption) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-24' AND T2.Date = '2013-08-24'

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.yearmonth.Date) = 2012 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.yearmonth.Date) = 2013 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.yearmonth.Date) = 2012 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date = y.Date
WHERE 
    t.Amount = 634.8 AND 
    t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (T2.consumption_2012 - T2.consumption_2013) / T2.consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND 
    T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (t.consumption_2012 - t.consumption_2013) / t.consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ym1.Consumption AS consumption_2012,
        ym2.Consumption AS consumption_2013
    FROM 
        transactions_1k AS t
    JOIN 
        yearmonth AS ym1 ON t.CustomerID = ym1.CustomerID AND ym1.Date LIKE '2012%'
    JOIN 
        yearmonth AS ym2 ON t.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID AND ym2.Date LIKE '2013%'
    WHERE 
        t.Amount = 634.8 AND ym1.Date = '2012-08-25'
) AS t;

-- Step 1: Find the CustomerID of the customer who made the transaction of 634.8 on 2012/8/25
SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8;

-- Step 2: Calculate the consumption of this customer in August 2012
WITH CustomerConsumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) as total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN transactions_1k ON yearmonth.CustomerID = transactions_1k.CustomerID
    WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '2012-08-01' AND '2012-08-31'
)
SELECT total_consumption FROM CustomerConsumption;

-- Step 3: Calculate the consumption of this customer in August 2013
WITH CustomerConsumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) as total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN transactions_1k ON yearmonth.CustomerID = transactions_1k.CustomerID
    WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '2013-08-01' AND '2013-08-31'
)
SELECT total_consumption FROM CustomerConsumption;

-- Step 4: Compute the consumption decrease rate
WITH CustomerConsumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) as total_consumption_2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '2012-08-01' AND '2012-08-31' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) as consumption_2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '2013-08-01' AND '2013-08-31' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) as consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN transactions_1k ON yearmonth.CustomerID = transactions_1k.CustomerID
    WHERE yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '2012-08-01' AND '2013-08-31'
)
SELECT (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) -
       SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS diff
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE T1.club = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM 
    event AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
INNER JOIN 
    expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget
WHERE 
    T1.status = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T3.spent ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T3.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference_spent
FROM 
    event AS T1
JOIN 
    attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
JOIN 
    member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id
JOIN 
    budget AS T4 ON T1.event_id = T4.link_to_event
WHERE 
    T3.first_name = 'Student' AND T3.last_name = 'Club';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) -
SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference_spent
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE T1.type LIKE '%Student_Club%'

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / NULLIF(b.amount, 0)) AS ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON e.event_id = ex.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(b.spent) / SUM(b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS ratio
FROM budget b
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.Date AS LabCompletionDate, YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.Date, (YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS AgeAtArrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    p.Birthday,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.`First Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.Birthday) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.Date, (YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY AgeAtAdmission DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.patient_id = p.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

1185:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN `Date` LIKE '1981-11-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN `Date` LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN `Date` LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18'

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory L
JOIN 
    Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) + 0.001) * 100 AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T
INNER JOIN 
    Patient AS P ON T.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT CASE WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M' THEN 'Normal'
             WHEN T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal'
             ELSE 'Abnormal'
        END AS UricAcidRange
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T2.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND l.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Abnormal'
    END AS UricAcidStatus
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.ID = 57266;

SELECT CASE 
           WHEN T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M' THEN 'Normal'
           WHEN T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal'

       END AS UracilAcidStatus

WHERE p.ID = 57266;

1243:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(l.PT) AS "Percentage of Female with Abnormal PT"
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(GETDATE()), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55
    AND T1.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN L.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, P.Birthday, GETDATE()) > 55

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
  (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
   COUNT(Laboratory.PT)) * 100 AS FemalePercentageWithAbnormalPT
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, Patient.Birthday))) > 55
  AND Laboratory.PT >= 14;

JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id
GROUP BY T1.id
ORDER BY num_matches DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.name, COUNT(*) as match_count
FROM League AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id
GROUP BY T1.name
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name, COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
GROUP BY T1.league_id
ORDER BY match_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
1029: SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes
JOIN Team ON Team_Attributes.team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT T1.buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team_Attributes AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
ORDER BY T1.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4
SELECT T1.id, T1.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id ORDER BY T1.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT ta.buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.date = (
    SELECT MAX(date)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE team_api_id = t.team_api_id
)
ORDER BY ta.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
LIMIT 4
1025:
SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L.name, SUM(M.home_team_goal + M.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match AS M
JOIN League AS L ON M.country_id = L.country_id
WHERE M.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY L.id
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name AS league_name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.name AS league_name, SUM(T1.home_team_goal + T1.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY T2.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T2.name FROM Match AS T1 JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T1.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(T1.home_team_goal + T1.away_team_goal) DESC LIMIT 1
1031:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, DATE_PART('year', AGE(NOW(), p.birthday)) AS current_age
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM pa.date) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birthday, pa.date) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM pa.date) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015;

SELECT strftime('%Y', date('now')) - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97
AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'

SELECT 
    T1.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, T1.birthday, NOW()) AS age
FROM 
    Player AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT T1.team_long_name
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T2.league_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T2.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T1.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T2.away_team_goal > T2.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T3.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) as num_wins
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.away_team_api_id, T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) as win_count
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY win_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal;

SELECT T1.team_long_name
FROM Team AS T1

AND T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (

)

SELECT DISTINCT T1.team_long_name
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN Match AS M ON (T1.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id OR T1.team_api_id = M.home_team_api_id)
WHERE strftime('%Y', M.date) = '2012'
AND T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(T2.buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team AS T1
    JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
    JOIN Match AS M ON (T1.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id OR T1.team_api_id = M.home_team_api_id)
    WHERE strftime('%Y', M.date) = '2012'
);

1076:
SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) - AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS diff FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye')

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    ABS((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
     (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END))) AS diff
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) AS difference_of_average_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

1058:
SELECT p.player_api_id, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height BETWEEN (
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
) AND (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id
ORDER BY avg_finishing_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
);

SELECT player_api_id FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE (height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)) OR (height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)) GROUP BY player_api_id ORDER BY AVG(T2.finishing) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH TallestPlayers AS (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
),
ShortestPlayers AS (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
)

SELECT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p.player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM TallestPlayers)
OR
    p.player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM ShortestPlayers)
GROUP BY 
    p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY 
    avg_finishing_rate DESC;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT AVG(T1.finishing) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1)) > 
         (SELECT AVG(T1.finishing) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1)) THEN
      (SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1))
    ELSE
      (SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1))
  END AS player_with_highest_avg_finishing_rate;

SELECT 
    ((T1.overall_rating - T2.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel');

SELECT ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T3.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND T3.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'

SELECT 
    ((p1.overall_rating - p2.overall_rating) / p2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player_Attributes pa1
JOIN 
    Player p1 ON pa1.player_api_id = p1.player_api_id AND pa1.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = p1.player_api_id)
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa2
JOIN 
    Player p2 ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id AND pa2.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = p2.player_api_id)
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND p2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100 / 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((T1.overall_rating - T2.overall_rating) / T1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.date = '2013-07-12' AND 
    (T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' OR T2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((pa1.overall_rating - pa2.overall_rating) / pa1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    AND pa1.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS diff,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS donovan_rating,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS bowery_rating
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12'

SELECT 
    (T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) * 100.0 / T2.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T3.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')
ORDER BY 
    T1.player_name;

SELECT 
    ((pa1.overall_rating - pa2.overall_rating) / pa1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player p2
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa1.date = '2013/7/12' AND p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND pa2.date = '2013/7/12' AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

1124: SELECT p.player_name FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name 
FROM Player_Attributes pa 
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High'

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Match m ON pa.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11)
JOIN Player_Attributes pa2 ON m.match_api_id IN (pa2.match_api_id) AND pa2.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High';

SELECT p.player_name
FROM Player AS p
JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Match AS m ON (pa.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11)
                     AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa2

880:
SELECT ((MAX(T2.fastestlapspeed) - MAX(T2.fastestlapspeed)) / MAX(T2.fastestlapspeed)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.round = 853

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed END) - MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 854 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed END)) / MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceId = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON r1.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 854 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) / MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r1 ON d.driverid = r1.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON r1.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T4 ON T2.raceid = T4.raceid AND T3.raceid = T4.raceid + 1
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND T4.raceid = 853;

SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 854 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND 
    d.surname = 'di Resta' AND 
    r.raceid IN (853, 854);

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
WHERE ds.wins > 0
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, max_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid

ORDER BY COUNT(T2.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

LIMIT 1;

951:
SELECT COUNT(c.constructorId)
FROM constructorStandings cs
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE cs.points = 0
GROUP BY c.constructorId
HAVING COUNT(cs.constructorId) = 2;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.constructorId)
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
GROUP BY c.constructorId
HAVING COUNT(r.raceId) = 2 AND SUM(cs.points) = 0;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS numberOfJapaneseConstructors
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorid = constructorstandings.constructorid
JOIN races ON constructorstandings.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Japanese'
GROUP BY constructors.constructorid
HAVING SUM(constructorstandings.points) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT races.raceid) = 2;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.constructorId)
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
AND cs.points = 0
GROUP BY c.constructorId
HAVING COUNT(r.raceid) = 2;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.constructorId)
FROM constructors c
INNER JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
GROUP BY c.constructorid
HAVING SUM(cs.points) = 0 AND COUNT(cs.raceid) = 2;
954:
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND
    T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND
    T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverid) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.driverid) AS CompletionPercentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' 
    AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

944:
SELECT 
    (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T1.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 60000 + CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T1.time, '.', -1), ',', 1), ',', '') AS UNSIGNED)) / 1000 AS total_time,
    D1.forename || ' ' || D1.surname AS driver_name
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS D1 ON T1.driverid = D1.driverid
JOIN 
    driverstandings AS DS ON T1.driverid = DS.driverid AND T1.raceid = DS.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.raceid = (
        SELECT raceid 
        FROM races 
        WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    )
ORDER BY 
    DS.position DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    ((TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time) - TIME_TO_SEC(T3.time)) / TIME_TO_SEC(T3.time)) * 100 AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid AND T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
WHERE 
    T2.position = 1 -- champion
    AND T3.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid AND year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') -- last-place driver

SELECT ((TIME_TO_SEC('1:59:00.000') - TIME_TO_SEC(T2.last_place_time)) / TIME_TO_SEC('1:59:00.000')) * 100 AS percentage_increase FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T2.POSITION = (SELECT MAX(POSITION) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid)

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 9, 2) AS REAL) * 60000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 12, 2) AS REAL) * 1000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 15, 3) AS REAL)) - 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 9, 2) AS REAL) * 60000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 12, 2) AS REAL) * 1000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 15, 3) AS REAL)))) / 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 9, 2) AS REAL) * 60000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 12, 2) AS REAL) * 1000 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 15, 3) AS REAL))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T2.driverid = (SELECT MIN(driverid) FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'))
WHERE 
    T1.raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND
    T1.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'));

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS time_diff_seconds,
    (CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS champion_time_seconds,
    (CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS last_driver_time_seconds
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY 
    T2.position DESC
LIMIT 2;
959: SELECT T1.fastestLap FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T1.year = 2009 AND T1.position = 1

JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.position = 1;

SELECT r.fastestlap
FROM driverstandings ds
JOIN results r ON ds.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE ds.year = 2009 AND ds.wins = (
    SELECT MAX(wins)
    FROM driverstandings
    WHERE year = 2009
);

SELECT r.fastestLap
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid AND ds.year = 2009
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid AND r.year = 2009
ORDER BY ds.wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.fastestLap AS fastest_lap_number, TIME_FORMAT(r.fastestLapTime, '%H:%i:%s.%f') AS fastest_lap_time
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
JOIN races r ON ds.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year = 2009
ORDER BY ds.wins DESC
LIMIT 1;
955:
SELECT YEAR, AVG((TIME_TO_SEC(time))) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE YEAR < 1975 AND TIME IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY YEAR;

SELECT AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time)) AS avg_time_seconds, T1.year
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.year < 1975
GROUP BY T1.year;

SELECT AVG(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING_INDEX(time, '.', 1), '%H:%i:%s') + SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(time, '.', -1), ',', 1) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers
JOIN driverstandings ON drivers.driverid = driverstandings.driverid AND driverstandings.position = 1
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
WHERE YEAR(results.date) < 1975
GROUP BY YEAR(results.date);

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS year,
    AVG(
        TIME_TO_SEC(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(results.time, ':', 1), ':',
                           SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(results.time, ':', 2), ':', -1),
                           '.')) +
        TIME_TO_SEC(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(results.time, '.', 1), '.', -2))
    ) / COUNT(*) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR(races.date) < 1975 AND results.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT AVG(
    (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':', INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1) - INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':', INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1) + 1) AS INTEGER)) / 1000
) AS average_time_seconds
FROM results AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.championship = 1 AND T1.year < 1975 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL;

977:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results AS r
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN status AS s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE ra.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 99 AND s.statusid = 2;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverid) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T2.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 99 AND T1.statusid = 2

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.statusId = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disqualified_count
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN status AS T3 ON T2.statusid = T3.statusid
WHERE T1.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 99;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results AS r
JOIN status AS s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND r.statusid = 2
AND r.time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN status AS T3 ON T2.statusid = T3.statusid WHERE T2.statusid IS NOT NULL AND T1.raceid BETWEEN 50 AND 99;
981:
SELECT r.name, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) AS year, T2.date, T2.time FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid ORDER BY T1.dob ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC, r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(q1), d.name, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.date, r.time, d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.date = (
    SELECT MIN(r2.date)
    FROM drivers d2
    JOIN qualifying q2 ON d2.driverid = q2.driverid
    JOIN races r2 ON q2.raceid = r2.raceid
)
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;
972: SELECT T1.driverid, T1.code FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid WHERE YEAR(T1.dob) = 1971 AND T3.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM results r
INNER JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE YEAR(d.dob) = 1971 AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL;

SELECT T1.driverid, T1.code FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.dob) = '1971' ORDER BY T3.fastestlaptimes DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE YEAR(d.dob) = 1971 AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL;

SELECT T1.driverid, T1.code
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
WHERE YEAR(T1.dob) = 1971
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY T1.fastestLapTime DESC
LIMIT 1;
989: SELECT r.driverid, r.position, r.time FROM results AS r JOIN races AS rr ON r.raceid = rr.raceid WHERE rr.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND rr.year = 2008 AND r.position = 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
AND r.points = (
    SELECT MAX(points)
    FROM results
    JOIN races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
    WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
);

SELECT D.forename, D.surname, R.milliseconds 
FROM races AS R 
JOIN results AS Res ON R.raceid = Res.raceid 
JOIN drivers AS D ON Res.driverid = D.driverid 
WHERE R.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND R.year = 2008;

SELECT D.forename, D.surname, R.time
FROM drivers AS D
JOIN results AS R ON D.driverid = R.driverid
JOIN races AS Ra ON R.raceid = Ra.raceid
WHERE Ra.year = 2008 AND Ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'

SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, T1.time
FROM results AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.raceid = (
    SELECT raceid
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
ORDER BY T1.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN results AS r ON c.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.milliseconds DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.position DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url
FROM races AS T1
JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid
WHERE T1.year = 2009 AND T1.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY T2.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorref, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN results AS r ON cs.constructorid = r.constructorid AND cs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

988:
SELECT d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN pitstops AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T1.nationality = 'German' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985' GROUP BY T1.driverid ORDER BY AVG(T2.duration) LIMIT 3

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, AVG(T2.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN pitstops AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(T1.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name

WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers);

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name

JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name

994:
SELECT SUM(c.constructorStandings.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON r.raceid = cs.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceid = cr.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.racename LIKE '%Monaco%' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cs.points) AS total_points
FROM races r
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON r.raceid = cs.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.circuitid IN (
    SELECT circuitid FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
)
AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(T2.points), T3.name, T3.nationality
FROM races AS T1
JOIN constructorResults AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid
WHERE T1.country = 'Monaco' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY T2.constructorid
ORDER BY SUM(T2.points) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT sum(points) as total_points, constructors.name, constructors.nationality FROM constructorresults JOIN constructors ON constructorresults.constructorid = constructors.constructorid WHERE constructorresults.constructorid IN ( SELECT constructorid FROM races JOIN constructorresults ON races.raceid = constructorresults.raceid WHERE races.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND races.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 ) ORDER BY sum(points) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND q.q3 IS NOT NULL AND q.q3 != '' AND q.position = 1;

FROM drivers d

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1

1003:
SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS numberOfAccidents
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'accident'
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY numberOfAccidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) as accident_count
FROM results
JOIN status ON results.statusid = status.statusid
WHERE status.status = 'Accident'
AND results.raceid IN (
    SELECT raceid
    FROM races
    WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
GROUP BY results.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count, r.driverid, d.forename, d.surname
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE s.statusid = 3 AND races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY r.driverid, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.driverId FROM results AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.statusid = T2.statusid WHERE T2.status = 'Accident' AND T1.raceid = ( SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' ) GROUP BY T1.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.driverid, COUNT(r.resultid) as accident_count
FROM results AS r
JOIN status AS s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix') AND s.statusid = 3
GROUP BY r.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
ORDER BY lt.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, l.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
ORDER BY l.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM lapTimes)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.position = 1 AND lt.lap = 1
ORDER BY lt.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE l.time = (
    SELECT MIN(REPLACE(SUBSTR(l2.time, 1, INSTR(l2.time, ':') - 1), '.', '') || '.' ||
               REPLACE(SUBSTR(l2.time, INSTR(l2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(l2.time, '.') - INSTR(l2.time, ':') - 1), '.', '')) AS min_time
    FROM lapTimes l2
)
LIMIT 20;

WHERE c.country = 'Italy'

SELECT COUNT(superhero.id)
FROM superhero
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id
WHERE superpower.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND superhero.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM hero_power AS hp
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id
WHERE sp.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND s.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.id)
FROM hero_power hp
JOIN superpower s ON hp.power_id = s.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON hp.hero_id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
JOIN superhero h ON ha.hero_id = h.id
WHERE s.power_name = 'Super Strength'
AND h.height_cm > 200;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(superhero.id) AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    SUM(CASE WHEN superhero.publisher_id IN (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_comics_count
FROM 
    superhero
JOIN 
    publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE 
    superhero.alignment_id IN (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'Bad');

SELECT 
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id))::numeric, 2) AS percentage_bad,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
     COUNT(T1.id) AS total_marvel_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(T2.alignment) AS percentage_marvel_bad,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad,
    COUNT(T2.alignment) AS total_bad_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.alignment = 'Bad';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM 
    alignment AS T1
JOIN 
    superhero AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.alignment_id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T1.alignment = 'Bad';

    WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'

    SELECT UserId
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),

    SELECT OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    WHERE Views >= 1000
)

JOIN PostsOver1000Views popv ON u.Id = popv.OwnerUserId;

)

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges b
WHERE 
    b.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((COUNT_2010 / COUNT_2011) * 100 - 100) AS "PercentageDifference"
FROM 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_2010 FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Student' AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010') AS sub2010,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_2011 FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Student' AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011') AS sub2011;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 1) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_PART('year', Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_2010,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_PART('year', Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_2011,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_PART('year', Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
      SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_PART('year', Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.Id) AS percentage
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    posthistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
JOIN 
    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
JOIN 
    tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'
WHERE 
    u.DisplayName = 'Community';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t2.TagName = 'r' THEN p.Id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.Id) AS percentage
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    posthistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
JOIN 
    users u ON ph.UserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN 
    postlinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
LEFT JOIN 
    tags t2 ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t2.TagName || '%'
WHERE 
    u.DisplayName = 'Community';

459: SELECT MAX(convertedManaCost) FROM cards WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper')

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(convertedManaCost) = (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Serra Angel') THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS CostlierCard
FROM 
    cards
WHERE 
    name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper');

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(convertedManaCost) = (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Serra Angel') THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS CardWithHigherManaCost;

SELECT c1.name AS card1, c2.name AS card2, 
       CASE 
           WHEN c1.convertedManaCost > c2.convertedManaCost THEN c1.name
           ELSE c2.name
       END AS more_expensive_card,
       GREATEST(c1.convertedManaCost, c2.convertedManaCost) AS converted_mana_cost
FROM cards c1
JOIN cards c2 ON c2.id <> c1.id AND c2.name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper')
WHERE c1.name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper');

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN c1.convertedManaCost > c2.convertedManaCost THEN c1.name
        ELSE c2.name
    END AS card_with_higher_cost
FROM 
    cards c1
JOIN 
    cards c2 ON c1.id = c2.id
WHERE 
    c1.name = 'Serra Angel' AND c2.name = 'Shrine Keeper';
